title: Individual views of navigation panel

posts.author: DanielaHuber (Daniela Huber)
posts.cookedHtml: We have several folders within our navigation panel that relate to different teams/groups within our company and individual users would like to be able to order the navigation panel with their projects first. The “favorite” boards option is fine but additional clicks and then hides everything else. Is there a way to have the navigation panel customizable per user, versus a default view for everyone?
